messages.text: You carve into {target} with the cinder warblade and its burning edge sears the wound shut for {damage}.
{source} carves into you with a cinder warblade whose edge burns as it bites, for {damage}.
{source} carves into {target} with a burning cinder warblade.
You sweep the cinder warblade at {target} and it hisses through empty air.
{source} sweeps a cinder warblade at you and it hisses past.
{source} sweeps a cinder warblade at {target} and misses.
You bury the cinder warblade deep in {target} and its trapped fire erupts along the blade for {damage}!
{source} buries a cinder warblade deep in you and its trapped fire erupts for {damage}!
{source} buries a cinder warblade deep in {target} and fire bursts along the blade!
